entries.description_ja: 頸椎損傷 詳細不明
entries.description_en: Injuries to the Cervical Spine NFS

entries.description_ja: 頸椎損傷による死亡 (詳細不明) または剖検なし
entries.description_en: Died of cervical spine injury without further substantiation of injuries or no autopsy confirmation of specific injuries.
entries.collision_note: level 衝突: 2 → 1（日本語ページを優先して上書き）

entries.description_ja: 腕神経叢損傷 詳細不明 [神経幹, 神経索, 神経束を含む]
entries.description_en: Brachial Plexus injury NFS [includes trunks, divisions or cords]

entries.description_ja: 不全型神経叢損傷 詳細不明

entries.collision_note: description_en 衝突: [complete plexus injury NFS] vs [bilateral] → 既存値を使用; level 衝突: 2 vs 3（既存値を保持）
description_en 衝突: [avulsion] vs [bilateral] → 既存値を使用

entries.description_ja: 頸髄挫傷 [画像診断あるいは剖検により証明された脊柱管内の圧迫や硬膜外, 硬膜下血腫の診断を含む] 詳細不明
entries.description_en: Cord contusion NFS [includes the diagnosis of compression, or epidural or subdural hemorrhage within spinal canal documented by imaging studies or autopsy]

entries.description_ja: 一過性の神経症状 (知覚異常) を伴う 骨折・脱臼につい ては不明
entries.description_en: with transient neurological signs (paresthesia), but NFS as to fracture/dislocation
entries.collision_note: level 衝突: 2 → 1（日本語ページを優先して上書き）

entries.description_ja: 骨折や脱臼を伴わない
不全麻痺 [何らかの知覚あるいは運動機能の残存; 前脊髄症候群, 中心性脊髄症候群, 外側脊髄症候群 (Brown-Se- quard 症候群)] を含む, 骨折・脱臼については不明
entries.description_en: incomplete cord syndrome (preservation of some sensation or motor function; includes anterior cord, central cord, lateral cord (Brown-Sequard) syndromes) , but NFS as to fracture/dislocation

entries.description_ja: 骨折や脱臼を伴わない

entries.description_en: Code each vertebra separately. Note instructions at lamina, pedicle and vertebral body for coding fractures of the atlas (C1).
Exceptions : odontoid or major compression fracture which are coded additionally.
